projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage Q1 2025 - detailed engineering and procurement for HV equipment (transformers, circuit breakers, GIS) expected to commence for major works packages.
projects.summary: Major 500kV interconnector between Victoria and New South Wales. Involves significant new transmission lines and substation infrastructure, including new HV transformers, circuit breakers, and GIS. Project is in regulatory approval and planning stages, with major procurement for construction expected from H1 2025.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - specialist QAQC surveillance and FAT for remaining HV equipment deliveries (transformers, switchgear, GIS) and commissioning inspection for various stages of the multi-year project.
projects.summary: Critical 500kV transmission line connecting Snowy 2.0 to the grid. Significant HV infrastructure including substations, transformers, circuit breakers, and GIS. While main EPC awarded, specialist sub-packages for HV equipment FAT and QAQC are still relevant during the multi-year construction.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage Q4 2024 - pre-tender support, then Q1 2025 for specialist HVDC converter station equipment (transformers, circuit breakers, switchgear) and associated transmission infrastructure.
projects.summary: A 1500MW capacity undersea HVDC interconnector. Involves substantial HVDC converter stations, new transmission lines, substations and potentially large-scale BESS for system stability. Key HV components include transformers, HVDC circuit breakers, and switchgear. Currently in planning with major procurement expected H2 2024 / H1 2025.

projects.location: New South Wales and South Australia
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - specialist QAQC surveillance and FAT for ongoing HV equipment deliveries (transformers, switchgear, GIS) and commissioning inspection as various sections of the line are energized.
projects.summary: A 330kV interconnector between Wagga Wagga (NSW) and Robertstown (SA). Involves new transmission lines and substations, including new HV transformers, circuit breakers, and GIS. Construction is ongoing, so specialist sub-packages for HV equipment FAT and QAQC are relevant.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - main transmission works tender active, target HV equipment (transformers, circuit breakers, GIS) procurement packages for FAT and QAQC surveillance.
projects.summary: Development of new 330kV transmission lines, substations and associated infrastructure to connect renewable energy projects within the Central-West Orana REZ. Main transmission works tenders are active, offering immediate opportunities for HV equipment FAT and QAQC.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage Q1 2025 - pre-tender support and early engagement with potential EPCs as tenders for main works (including HV substations, transmission lines, transformers, circuit breakers) are expected to open.
projects.summary: Planning and development of new transmission lines and substations to connect renewable energy projects within the Hunter-Central Coast REZ. Involves significant new HV infrastructure including transformers, circuit breakers, and GIS. Major procurement expected H1 2025.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 - pre-tender support and early engagement for HV substation and transmission line packages, including transformers and switchgear.
projects.summary: Planning and development of new transmission lines and substations to connect renewable energy projects within the New England REZ. Significant HV infrastructure including transformers and circuit breakers. Major procurement expected H2 2025.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - specialist QAQC surveillance and FAT for HV equipment (transformers, circuit breakers, switchgear) and commissioning inspection as the large-scale BESS and associated grid connection infrastructure are being installed.
projects.summary: A 700MW / 1400MWh BESS designed to act as a 'super battery' for grid stability. Involves significant HV equipment, including transformers, circuit breakers, and extensive substation works for grid connection. Construction is ongoing, providing immediate opportunities for specialist QAQC and FAT services.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - specialist QAQC surveillance and FAT for HV equipment (transformers, circuit breakers, switchgear) for the BESS and grid connection components.
projects.summary: A 250MW / 500MWh BESS project. Construction commenced after FID in Q4 2023. Involves significant HV equipment including step-up transformers and grid connection switchgear. Specialist QAQC and FAT for these components are highly relevant now.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - specialist QAQC surveillance and FAT for HV equipment (transformers, circuit breakers, switchgear) for the BESS and grid connection components.
projects.summary: A 250MW / 500MWh BESS project. Construction commenced Q1 2024. Involves significant HV equipment including step-up transformers and grid connection switchgear. Specialist QAQC and FAT for these components are highly relevant now.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 - pre-tender discussions and early engagement for EPC and major equipment supply (wind turbines, transformers, substation equipment).
projects.summary: Second stage of a large wind farm, adding 400MW. Stage 1 is under construction. Requires new collection substations, transformers, and grid connection infrastructure. Major procurement for Stage 2 expected from H2 2025.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2026 - focus on power infrastructure planning, grid connection studies, and procurement for new substation, transformers, and switchgear packages.
projects.summary: Proposed 200MW hyperscale data centre requiring significant new grid connection and substation infrastructure. Early planning stage, with power infrastructure procurement expected around H1 2026.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - specialist QAQC surveillance and FAT for HV equipment (transformers, switchgear) for new substation and grid connection infrastructure.
projects.summary: Hyperscale AI data centre under construction, requiring new grid connections and potentially new substation infrastructure. While overall construction is underway, procurement and FAT for HV power components (transformers, switchgear) for staged power supply are still relevant.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - specialist QAQC surveillance and FAT for HV equipment (transformers, circuit breakers, switchgear) for the large-scale BESS and its grid connection.
projects.summary: A 400MW / 1600MWh BESS project with construction started early 2024. Involves substantial HV equipment including transformers and grid connection switchgear for a significant grid connection. Opportunities for specialist QAQC and FAT services are immediate.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - as construction begins, focus on engagement for HV equipment (transformers, circuit breakers, switchgear) FAT and QAQC surveillance.
projects.summary: A 250MW / 500MWh BESS project, expected to commence construction in Q2 2024. Located adjacent to Limondale Solar Farm, it requires new grid connection infrastructure and significant HV equipment including transformers and switchgear. Immediate opportunities for QAQC and FAT.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2024 - as construction commences, target HV equipment (transformers, circuit breakers, switchgear) FAT and QAQC surveillance.
projects.summary: A 250MW / 500MWh BESS project, with construction expected to begin in H2 2024. Will require new grid connection infrastructure and substantial HV equipment like transformers and switchgear. Opportunities for QAQC and FAT services are imminent.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - specialist QAQC surveillance and FAT for HV equipment (transformers, circuit breakers, switchgear) for the BESS and grid connection components.
projects.summary: A 200MW / 400MWh BESS project with construction commenced in Q1 2024. Involves significant HV equipment including step-up transformers and grid connection switchgear. Specialist QAQC and FAT for these components are highly relevant now.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage Q4 2024 - following FID, procurement for EPC and major equipment (solar panels, inverters, BESS, transformers, switchgear) will begin.
projects.summary: A 400MW solar farm co-located with a 200MW / 400MWh BESS. Development approval granted, FID expected H2 2024. Requires new substations, transformers, and switchgear for both solar and battery components. Procurement for HV equipment will be a key opportunity.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H1 2025 - procurement for EPC and major equipment (solar panels, inverters, transformers, switchgear) for new substation and grid connection.
projects.summary: A 180MW solar farm approved in Q1 2024. Requires new substation, transformers, and switchgear for grid connection. Procurement for major components expected H1 2025.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2024 - following FID, procurement for EPC and major equipment (turbines, BESS, transformers, switchgear) for new substation and grid connection.
projects.summary: A 100MW wind farm co-located with a 50MW / 100MWh battery, received planning approval late 2023. FID and procurement for major components including HV transformers and switchgear for the substation are expected H2 2024.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage H2 2025 - as development progresses, procurement for major equipment (turbines, transformers, switchgear) and substation works will be a focus.
projects.summary: Proposed 330MW wind farm, currently in development application phase. Will require new collection substations, transformers, and grid connection infrastructure. Procurement for major components expected from H2 2025.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage Q3 2024 - EPC and HV equipment (500kV transformers, circuit breakers, GIS) procurement will commence for new substations and transmission lines.
projects.summary: One of 15 lots awarded in ANEEL's March 2024 transmission auction. This specific lot involves a new 500kV transmission line and associated substations, including HV transformers, circuit breakers, and GIS. Procurement for EPC and major HV equipment is expected to start Q3 2024.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage Q3 2024 - EPC and HV equipment (500kV transformers, circuit breakers, GIS) procurement for new substations and transmission lines.
projects.summary: Another lot from ANEEL's March 2024 transmission auction. This lot includes new 500kV transmission lines and substations, requiring substantial HV transformers, circuit breakers, and GIS. Major procurement for construction and equipment expected Q3 2024.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage Q3 2024 - EPC and HV equipment (500kV transformers, circuit breakers, GIS) procurement for new substations and transmission lines.
projects.summary: Part of ANEEL's March 2024 transmission auction, this lot comprises new 500kV transmission lines and associated substation expansion. Requires HV transformers, circuit breakers, and switchgear. Procurement for these components expected to kick off Q3 2024.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Engage Q4 2024 - detailed design and procurement for 230kV substation expansion, including new HV transformers, circuit breakers, and switchgear.
projects.summary: This lot from ANEEL's March 2024 auction focuses on the expansion of a 230kV substation in Ceará. It will involve new HV transformers, circuit breakers, and switchgear. Procurement is anticipated to start in Q4 2024.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - continuous QAQC surveillance and FAT for wind turbine transformers, collection substations (HV transformers, circuit breakers, switchgear), and grid connection infrastructure throughout the multi-year construction.
projects.summary: Large 846MW wind complex, one of Brazil's largest, currently under construction with BNDES financing secured Q1 2024. Involves extensive HV infrastructure including individual turbine transformers, collection substations with HV transformers and switchgear, and dedicated transmission lines. Ongoing opportunities for specialist QAQC and FAT services.

projects.projectName: Rio do Vento Wind Complex Phase 3
projects.location: Rio do Vento, Rio Grande do Norte
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - continuous QAQC surveillance and FAT for wind turbine transformers, collection substations (HV transformers, circuit breakers, switchgear), and grid connection infrastructure throughout the multi-year construction.
projects.summary: Expansion of an existing wind complex by 504MW, with BNDES financing secured late 2023. This phase is under construction and involves new wind turbines, collection substations with HV transformers and switchgear, and grid connection. Specialist QAQC and FAT services are relevant for ongoing equipment deliveries.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Immediate - continuous QAQC surveillance and FAT for PV plant step-up transformers, collection substations (HV transformers, circuit breakers, switchgear), and grid connection infrastructure.
projects.summary: Expansion of the Futura 1 Solar Complex by 400MW, currently under construction with BNDES financing secured Q1 2024. This involves significant HV equipment including multiple step-up transformers, new collection substations with HV circuit breakers and switchgear, and integration into the existing transmission infrastructure. Immediate opportunities for QAQC and FAT.
